overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a spaceship cockpit in a space simulation game. The player interacts with a holographic navigation system to plot a route between star systems, with amber glowing interface elements against a dark background.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship cockpit with holographic navigation interface

events.description: player selects destination waypoint on the holographic navigation map
route calculation completes and glowing path line appears connecting the waypoints

agents.ego_description: operating the holographic navigation interface, selecting star systems and plotting a course through the starmap

entered.detail: dark metallic structural elements of the spaceship cockpit visible at the bottom and edges of the frame
glowing amber holographic projection showing star systems and navigation points floating in the cockpit
faint stars and distant lights visible through the cockpit windows in the deep background

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place entirely within a spaceship cockpit, viewed from the pilot's first-person perspective. The player interacts with a holographic navigation system displaying glowing amber star maps and waypoints. The environment is dimly lit with artificial light from the interface. The player selects destinations and a route line appears connecting the points, indicating a course has been calculated.

[t=9s] cockpit_frame(bottom_near), holographic_route_line(center), waypoint_markers(scattered)

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a first-person interaction within a dimly lit spaceship cockpit as a static navigation interface transforms into an active flight path. It begins with the pilot facing a holographic navigation system, where glowing amber star maps and waypoints illuminate the dark interior. As the player interacts with the interface, the focus shifts toward the selection of specific destinations across the celestial grid. The scene then culminates as a bright route line manifests, connecting the chosen points to indicate that a course has been successfully calculated.
